headline: What's Happening With SOFI Stock?
summary: SoFi (SOFI) stock gained roughly 17% over five trading days, closing at $18.22 on May 29, 2026. Volume on the final day crossed 150 million shares, signaling strong institutional conviction behind the rally. This points to a deliberate re-rating, and three things drove it.
